text:
is a Cadet Corps cadet.

Appearance

Nack has dark brown eyes and brown hair which is swept back. He wears the standard Cadet Corps uniform.

Story

Nack practices hand-to-hand combat training with Jean.

Nack participates in an endurance training out in the wilderness during a rainstorm. He eventually graduates from the 104th Cadet Corps class.
